🌾 You're not flagged as a KUSUM specialist yet.
KUSUM leads (farmer solar pumps and ground-mounted solar plants) require MNRE pump empanellment and UPNEDA approval — separate from regular rooftop installation. If you have these certifications, contact admin to enable KUSUM lead routing.
📱 Contact admin to enable KUSUM
🌾 KUSUM specialist account active.
You receive PM-KUSUM leads for Components A (solar plants on barren land), B (standalone pumps), and C (grid-pump solarisation). Commission: 5% on system cost. SLA: 48 hours to claim.

🌾 UPDATE KUSUM LEAD STATUS

—

KUSUM stage progression:
contacted → site survey → UPNEDA application → sanction → installation → commissioned. Commission triggers when you mark 'commissioned'.

DECLINE LEAD

—

This lead will be released back to the pool and reassigned to another vendor.
